title: New Home Joinery Fitout — Epping
summary: New-home joinery fitout in Epping with a warm timber-look kitchen, pantry, study nook and supporting built-ins across the open-plan living zone.
heroAlt: Epping open-plan joinery fitout with kitchen, living area and timber screening
overview: This Epping fitout was planned as a whole-of-home joinery package rather than a single standout room. The kitchen, living storage, pantry and study nook all needed to feel connected so the new-build shell landed with warmth and character from day one.
materials: Primary finishes: Laminex Sublime Teak and Absolute Oak
Open-plan joinery designed to suit the architecture rather than compete with it
Pantry shelving and study joinery built to sit comfortably within the wider living zone
Vanity and secondary joinery details finished to match the rest of the home
Soft, warm timber tones used to make the new build feel more layered and lived in

afterImages.alt: Epping open-plan kitchen, dining and living with stone island and herringbone floor
afterImages.caption: The kitchen, dining and living zone open up as one space — stone island with brass sink, full-height timber joinery on the left, herringbone flooring throughout and full-width glazing to the garden.

afterImages.alt: Epping study nook with built-in timber desk, drawers and floating shelves
afterImages.caption: Study nook with a built-in timber desk, centre drawers and floating shelves — a proper work zone that sits neatly within the home without taking over a room.

afterImages.alt: Epping butler's pantry with open shelving, stone splashback nook and bar storage
afterImages.caption: Butler's pantry with adjustable open shelving, a stone splashback nook and dedicated bar storage — keeps the main kitchen clean while giving everything a proper home.

afterImages.alt: Epping fluted folding door divider and kitchen oven wall with full-height timber cabinetry
afterImages.caption: A fluted folding door separates the entry zone while the kitchen oven wall behind shows the full run of timber cabinetry and integrated appliances — two details working together across the same floor plan.

afterImages.alt: Epping secondary kitchen with full timber cabinetry, oven and small dining table
afterImages.caption: Secondary kitchen with full-height timber cabinetry, integrated oven, sink and a small dining setting — a self-contained zone that carries the same finish as the main kitchen.

afterImages.alt: Epping bathroom with freestanding bath, reeded timber vanity, vessel sink and brass tapware
afterImages.caption: Main bathroom with a freestanding bath, reeded timber floating vanity, vessel sink, brass tapware and a round backlit mirror — the timber finish carried through from the kitchen at the same level of quality.

beforeImages.alt: Epping kitchen zone during early installation — bare shell with first carcasses being set
beforeImages.caption: Early installation stage — first carcasses going in on a bare new-build shell before any doors, benchtops or finishes were fitted.

beforeImages.alt: Epping kitchen carcasses mid-installation with upper and lower cabinets being set out
beforeImages.caption: Upper and lower carcasses being set out during installation — the layout taking shape before doors and fronts went on.

beforeImages.alt: Epping kitchen cabinetry carcasses installed — drawers and tall units in position before fit-off
beforeImages.caption: Carcasses, drawer runners and tall units all in position — the structure of the joinery set before the final fronts and finishes were fitted.

spaces.title: Open-plan kitchen & living
spaces.text: The kitchen and adjoining living joinery were treated as one composition, helping the home feel warm, architectural and easy to live in from the first day.
spaces.alt: Epping kitchen and living zone with timber joinery

spaces.title: Study nook
spaces.text: The study nook adds a real work zone without carving out a full room. It is small-scale joinery that makes everyday life easier.
spaces.alt: Epping study nook with joinery shelving and desk

spaces.title: Pantry & storage
spaces.text: The pantry and supporting storage joinery were built to feel seamless with the kitchen, rather than like standalone add-ons.

spaces.title: Bathroom vanity
spaces.text: The bathroom vanity carried the reeded timber finish through from the kitchen — freestanding bath, vessel sink, brass tapware and a backlit mirror. Same material direction, same level of finish.
spaces.alt: Epping bathroom with reeded timber vanity, freestanding bath and brass tapware

outcome: The completed spaces feel more architectural and settled because the joinery gives the home a clear material direction and stronger built-in function from the start.
ctaText: Building or fitting out a new home in Sydney? We can help shape the kitchen, storage and supporting joinery so the whole home feels resolved from day one.
